// Flysound - AI-Powered Hearing Aids
// https://www.fly.clawpod.net

This landing page showcases Flysound hearing aids.

## Product
- Ultra-discreet hearing aids with AI-powered noise reduction
- Rechargeable with all-day battery life
- Bluetooth connectivity for phone and TV
- Affordable at $299 per pair

## Features
- Virtually invisible design
- AI-powered clarity for speech separation
- 16+ hours of comfortable wear
- 45-day risk-free trial
- 1-year warranty
- Lifetime support

## Contact
- Email: support@flysound.com
- Phone: 1-800-FLYSOUND
